name: Chocolate Marshmallow Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease an 11 1/2 x 7 baking pan.
2. Melt chocolate and butter in a double boiler over hot water. Set aside to cool slightly.
3. In a large bowl, cream together sugar and eggs until light and fluffy. Gradually add flour, mixing well.
4. Add the melted chocolate and butter mixture, then stir in vanilla extract and chopped pecans.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 18 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and cover with marshmallows. Return to the oven and bake until the marshmallows are lightly browned.
7. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into bars.
